name: Dauphinoise Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 garlic clove, pared, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter 4-inch tart molds.
2. Rub the molds with garlic.
3. Fill the molds with alternating layers of potato slices and cheese, finishing with cheese.
4. Season each layer with nutmeg, salt, and pepper.
5. Heat the milk to boiling.
6. Season the hot milk with additional salt.
7. Pour the hot milk into the molds over the layered potatoes and cheese.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30 to 40 minutes.
